Original: Knowledge is a treasure, but practice is the key to it. Write an essay (150-200 words).
Reference_Answer: Practice turns theoretical knowledge into usable skills; students should combine study with hands-on projects to consolidate learning.
Notes: Source: Baidu Wenku / New Oriental; recommend verifying with original scan

Original: Some people suggest that young people should be asked to participate in community service activities in their spare time. Write a composition (~200 words).
Reference_Answer: Community service cultivates social responsibility and practical skills; universities should provide more volunteer opportunities.
Notes: Source: Wendu / Mockist; verify full-text PDF

Original: On Voluntary Work. Discuss significance and how to promote it (150-200 words).
Reference_Answer: Voluntary work benefits students by improving empathy and practical ability; colleges can incentivize participation via credits and organized programs.
Notes: Source: CSDN compilation; seek original paper for exact wording

Original: On invention: importance and measures to encourage invention (150-200 words).
Reference_Answer: Inventions drive social progress; governments and universities should fund R&D and protect IP rights to encourage innovation.

Original: On Volunteering. Explain benefits for college students (150-200 words).
Reference_Answer: Volunteering enhances civic awareness and soft skills; schools should integrate service-learning into curricula.

Original: Comment on the saying 'Respect others, and you will be respected.' (150-200 words).
Reference_Answer: Mutual respect builds harmonious relationships; education and family upbringing play key roles.
Notes: Source: Book118 / New Oriental; multiple test sets exist
